warnings.message: np-display (type=num_display) at row 2, col 3 has active=1 but overlaps with btn-meat (type=section) at the same grid position. Should be active=0.
MELONS button at row 4, col 3 with row_span=2 is outside the visible product area (rows 0-3). Likely misplaced during keyboard editing.
CONFECTIONARY button has price=$0.00. Appears to be a placeholder that was never configured with an actual price.
4 empty cells on page 1: row 1 col 7, row 4 col 3, row 4 col 9, row 6 col 3.
Column 6 is consistently empty on pages 2-6, used as a spacer between product area and navigation buttons.
VIEW OR... button (type=viewor) has no implemented functionality. Placeholder from Profit Track layout.
Pages 2-6 only use rows 0-3 for products, leaving rows 4-6 empty. Wasted grid space.
keyboard_page_names setting is not configured. Pages use default numeric labels in the admin editor.
